'''âth-dh-d-b''' ('''kathadhdeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:footnote|footnote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:footnote|footnote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-dh-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhdeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhdeboko|thithadhdeboko]] || [[word:jithadhdeboko|jithadhdeboko]] || [[word:shithadhdeboko|shithadhdeboko]] || [[word:kithadhdeboko|kithadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhdeboko|thuthuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:jujuthadhdeboko|jujuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:shushuthadhdeboko|shushuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:kukuthadhdeboko|kukuthadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhdeboko|thuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:juthadhdeboko|juthadhdeboko]] || [[word:shuthadhdeboko|shuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:kuthadhdeboko|kuthadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhdeboko|thuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:juthadhdeboko|juthadhdeboko]] || [[word:shuthadhdeboko|shuthadhdeboko]] || [[word:kuthadhdeboko|kuthadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadhdeboko|thethadhdeboko]] || [[word:jethadhdeboko|jethadhdeboko]] || [[word:shethadhdeboko|shethadhdeboko]] || [[word:kethadhdeboko|kethadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadhdeboko|thothothadhdeboko]] || [[word:jojothadhdeboko|jojothadhdeboko]] || [[word:shoshothadhdeboko|shoshothadhdeboko]] || [[word:kokothadhdeboko|kokothadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhdeboko|thothadhdeboko]] || [[word:jothadhdeboko|jothadhdeboko]] || [[word:shothadhdeboko|shothadhdeboko]] || [[word:kothadhdeboko|kothadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhdeboko|thothadhdeboko]] || [[word:jothadhdeboko|jothadhdeboko]] || [[word:shothadhdeboko|shothadhdeboko]] || [[word:kothadhdeboko|kothadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthadhdeboko|thĂŠthadhdeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠthadhdeboko|jĂŠthadhdeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠthadhdeboko|shĂŠthadhdeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠthadhdeboko|kĂŠthadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhdeboko|thathathadhdeboko]] || [[word:jajathadhdeboko|jajathadhdeboko]] || [[word:shashathadhdeboko|shashathadhdeboko]] || [[word:kakathadhdeboko|kakathadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhdeboko|thathadhdeboko]] || [[word:jathadhdeboko|jathadhdeboko]] || [[word:shathadhdeboko|shathadhdeboko]] || [[word:kathadhdeboko|kathadhdeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhdeboko|thathadhdeboko]] || [[word:jathadhdeboko|jathadhdeboko]] || [[word:shathadhdeboko|shathadhdeboko]] || [[word:kathadhdeboko|kathadhdeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathadhdebithi|shathadhdebithi]] || [[word:shathadhdebiji|shathadhdebiji]] || [[word:shathadhdebishi|shathadhdebishi]] || [[word:shathadhdebiki|shathadhdebiki]]
